# Youth Activism Nepal

> Youth Activism Nepal is a youth-focused nonprofit organization in Nepal working on civic engagement, leadership, community projects, campaigns, partnerships, and youth development.

This website provides information about the organization, team, partners, projects, campaigns, blogs, and donation details.

## Key Pages

- https://youthactivismnepal.org.np/
- https://youthactivismnepal.org.np/team/
- https://youthactivismnepal.org.np/partners/
- https://youthactivismnepal.org.np/projects/
- https://youthactivismnepal.org.np/active-campaigns/
- https://youthactivismnepal.org.np/upcoming-projects/
- https://youthactivismnepal.org.np/blogs/
- https://youthactivismnepal.org.np/donate/

## Content Notes

- Blog and project detail content is loaded dynamically from the backend API.
- The sitemap is available at https://youthactivismnepal.org.np/sitemap.xml
- Contact: https://youthactivismnepal.org.np/donate/
- Email: info@youthactivismnepal.org.np
